title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready, not just test-passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics across 36 open-source repositories to evaluate code quality by real pull request standards.
